suffix: A beautiful young East Asian woman in her early twenties, delicate facial features, bright expressive eyes, soft glossy lips with natural makeup. Ultra-detailed, elegant, photorealistic. East Asian ethnicity only, Chinese or Japanese or Korean appearance.
